body.title: Consequence check: /audit-ticket hold-gate enforcement
body.result: CLEAR: Check 18 in place; only pre-existing hold passes on AKIEN DECISION note; no AMENDs or bypasses in 1-day observation window
body.intention: I intend that no spurious hold tickets reach the queue after the gate ships.
body.description:
**What changed:** /audit-ticket now flags hold-status tickets without a named dependency.

**Predicted unintended effects:** (1) Legitimate holds (rare) might be blocked if the description isn't explicit enough — easy fix but watch for friction; (2) The check might not fire on all /sorted paths if the ticket is re-filed directly via cc_queue.py.

**Signals to watch:** Any AMEND from /audit-ticket on a legitimate hold; any hold-status tickets in queue post-change that lack named dependencies (would indicate the check is bypassed).

**Gate condition:** After T-audit-ticket-hold-gate closes.

**Affected files:** None — observation only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe; annotate as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Completion criteria:** observation ticket; done when predicted effects annotated and ticket closed
